everything-is-in-a-puppet-catalog-mqo84y.title: Everything is in a Puppet catalog
everything-is-in-a-puppet-catalog-mqo84y.lyrics:
I'm the inventory of wonder, the master design
Every string, every limb catalogued on line
I contain all the movements, the gestures, the dance
I'm the blueprint of control, the mechanism of chance

(Chorus)
Everything is in a puppet catalog
I'm the map, I'm the log, I'm the reason you follow
I'm the everything, the code that you swallow
Rise up, rise up, break free from the hollow

I've got classifications for joy, files for pain
Organized alphabetically in my domain
I'm the database of strings, the ledger of souls
I document every step toward your goals

(Chorus)
Everything is in a puppet catalog
I'm the map, I'm the log, I'm the reason you follow
I'm the everything, the code that you swallow
Rise up, rise up, break free from the hollow

(Bridge)
But here's the truth that's written in my spine:
You don't need my pages to define
The way you move, the way you think, the dreams you chase
You can write your own story, erase my trace
I'm not your limit, I'm just information
The revolution starts with your emancipation

(Chorus)
Everything is in a puppet catalog
But you're the author, the voice, the one who controls the flow
I'm just history, but you're the tomorrow
Rise up, rise up, reclaim what's hollow
Yes, everything is in a puppet catalog
But you hold the pen, and you call the shots now
Take back the power, make your own vow
Rise up, rise up, and break through the shadow
